So now, we’re reaching out to our BEST Democratic supporters — _including YOU!_ — to help us solidify Kamala Harris’ approval rating.

name: CaucusRoom
subject: CaucusRoom Weekend Edition ☀️
body:
There's something missing from Biden's health update. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-qhkzhd-trhiujldw-yu/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkzhd-trhiujldw-r/)
### ** Welcome to the Weekend Wrap Up! **

### ** Here are the top articles that CaucusRoom members shared:**
* Check out the **[results of our straw poll](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkzhd-trhiujldw-y/).**
* The U.S.**[shot down](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkzhd-trhiujldw-j/) **more balloons.
* The **[10 spending cuts Republicans want](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkzhd-trhiujldw-t/)** in the debt limit deal.
* The **[Star Spangled Banner](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkzhd-trhiujldw-i/)** moved people at the Super Bowl.
* Biden is **[selling off more of our oil reserves](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkzhd-trhiujldw-d/).**
* **[Roseanne Barr](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkzhd-trhiujldw-h/)i**s back!
* There was a **[shooting at MSU.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkzhd-trhiujldw-k/)**
* **[Nikki Haley](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkzhd-trhiujldw-u/) **joins the**[GOP Presidental race.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkzhd-trhiujldw-o/)**
* Biden's**[economy is crushing seniors](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkzhd-trhiujldw-x/).**
* Senator **[Feinstein made an announcement](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkzhd-trhiujldw-m/) **that no one told her about.
* The U.S. **[tracked the Chinese Spy Balloon](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkzhd-trhiujldw-c/)** for a week.
* Buttigieg **[blames all of the train derailments](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkzhd-trhiujldw-q/)** on Trump.
* Dems want [**anyone but Biden** ](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkzhd-trhiujldw-a/)to run for President.
* Biden [**rejected disaster aid** ](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkzhd-trhiujldw-f/)for Ohio.

### **Trust the ****Government**
EPA boss says **[he would allow his kids to drink and bathe in the water](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkzhd-trhiujldw-z/)** in East Palestine Ohio because it is completely safe.
### **Missing Hobby Balloon**
## Republicans mock Biden **[for having fighter jets potentially shoot down a $13 hobby balloon](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkzhd-trhiujldw-v/)** and providing a 'powerful deterrence for any high school science clubs that might try to invade America'.
**Missing Info** **[Biden was deemed to be"healthy" and "vigorous"](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkzhd-trhiujldw-e/) **in his latest physical but medical experts pointed out his doctor didn't mention the president's mental status. [**Here For The Laughs**](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkzhd-trhiujldw-s/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkzhd-trhiujldw-g/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkzhd-trhiujldw-w/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkzhd-trhiujldw-yd/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkzhd-trhiujldw-yh/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhkzhd-trhiujldw-yk/) | CaucusRoom, LLC
800 Washington Ave Ste C
Golden, CO 80401 You are receiving this email because you are a member of CaucusRoom [Preferences](https://caucusroom.updatemyprofile.com/i-qhkzhd-6F882DBF-trhiujldw-jl) | [Unsubscribe](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-u-qhkzhd-trhiujldw-jr/)

clean_body: Friend: Don't miss Saturday afternoon's top conservative news! | | | | | | | | | Your input is critical to us and to the future of conservatism in America. We refuse to be silenced, and we hope you do too. and never miss a story. To ensure our email makes it to your inbox daily and not spam, please add our email address to your email contact list. | ## ## ## ## ## | ## ## ## ## ## ## ## ## ## | | | ## ## ## ## You Might Like | | | | - ---|---|---|---|---

name: Joe Biden
subject: If you’re ready to get to work, then make a donation of $7 to the Democratic National Committee to elect more Democrats:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
We’re at an inflection point, one of those moments that only a few generations ever face. The direction we take is going to decide the course of this nation for decades to come. | |
---
You’ve heard me say it before: We’re at an inflection point, one of those moments that only a few generations ever face. The direction we take is going to decide the course of this nation for decades to come. It’s always been my vision that we rebuild the backbone of America -- America's middle class -- and unite the country. **We’ve gotten a lot done, Derek, but we need to finish the job.** Grassroots donations last year and in years prior made all the difference in electing Democrats nationwide. Think about what a gift of $7 can do to power our work in 2023. That’s why I’m coming to you directly: **If you’re ready to get to work, then make a donation of $7 to the Democratic National Committee. They’re fighting to elect Democrats in every corner of our great country and helping build a better America.**

Together, we capped the cost of insulin at $35 a month for seniors on Medicare. Let's finish the job and cap the cost of insulin for _**everybody**_ at $35. Together, we passed the _Inflation Reduction Act_ \-- the most significant investment ever in fighting climate change -- lowering utility bills, creating American jobs, and leading the world towards a clean energy future. There’s more to do, and we’ve got to finish the job. Understand this, Derek: Social Security and Medicare are lifelines for millions of seniors. So let's stand up for seniors and show them we will not cut Social Security, we will not cut Medicare. If anyone tries to cut Social Security, if anyone tries to cut Medicare, I'll stop them. I'll veto it. And make no mistake about it, if Congress passes a national abortion ban, I will veto it. Congress must protect the rights from _Roe v. Wade._ **[We can do these things and more if we stick together. clean_body: We’re at an inflection point, one of those moments that only a few generations ever face. The direction we take is going to decide the course of this nation for decades to come. | | You’ve heard me say it before: We’re at an inflection point, one of those moments that only a few generations ever face. The direction we take is going to decide the course of this nation for decades to come. It’s always been my vision that we rebuild the backbone of America -- America's middle class -- and unite the country. We’ve gotten a lot done, Derek, but we need to finish the job. Grassroots donations last year and in years prior made all the difference in electing Democrats nationwide. Think about what a gift of $7 can do to power our work in 2023. That’s why I’m coming to you directly: If you’re ready to get to work, then make a donation of $7 to the Democratic National Committee. They’re fighting to elect Democrats in every corner of our great country and helping build a better America. Together, we capped the cost of insulin at $35 a month for seniors on Medicare. Let's finish the job and cap the cost of insulin for everybody at $35. Together, we passed the Inflation Reduction Act \-- the most significant investment ever in fighting climate change -- lowering utility bills, creating American jobs, and leading the world towards a clean energy future. There’s more to do, and we’ve got to finish the job. Understand this, Derek: Social Security and Medicare are lifelines for millions of seniors. So let's stand up for seniors and show them we will not cut Social Security, we will not cut Medicare. If anyone tries to cut Social Security, if anyone tries to cut Medicare, I'll stop them. I'll veto it. And make no mistake about it, if Congress passes a national abortion ban, I will veto it. Congress must protect the rights from Roe v. Wade. We the people are facing the test of our time. We have to be the nation we have always been -- a nation that embraces light over darkness, hope over fear, stability over chaos. We have to see each other as fellow Americans. We are good people. We are the only nation in the world built on an idea. The only one. Thank you, and God bless you. Joe Joseph R. | | | Peter,

Last November, the American people sent a clear statement to Washington: we do **NOT** approve of the path the Democrats are dragging us down. We took back the House, ending the dangerous one-party rule that oversaw the **COLLAPSE** of the economy, the **SURGE** of illegal immigrants, and the **EXPLOITATION** of America by foreign powers.

The midterm elections were just one battle in the war for the future of America. We were victorious in the House, but the fact of the matter is that Biden and Schumer still hold the White House and the Senate. They'll do their best to strike down **EVERY** piece of conservative legislation and keep America on a crash course towards their **WOKE NEW WORLD.**

name: United American Patriots
subject: BOGUS charges against a Hero
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United American Patriots |
body:
Help us fight for this patriot who sacrificed so much for our nation.

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zic39vbe7t1dkd9moklhad51pdff2uevvg9vivvo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g62ob0cjh2bs)
---
Friend, America’s Warriors write a blank check for our freedoms. They’re willing to go to war and face unimaginable odds to defend freedom and liberty. And how do we repay these Heroes? _By charging them, like the three below, with bogus crimes they didn’t commit._
---
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zg86fdol3tc05j9sa2kpoisuh39lsnip01tdsc1o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g62ob0cjh2bs)
---
Here’s what happened to the **MARSOC 3 Raiders** ... On New Year’s Eve in 2018, Chief Petty Officer Eric Gilmet and Gunnery Sergeants Danny Draher and Josh Negron were assaulted while trying to take a much-needed break on deployment at a local bar in Erbil, Iraq. All was well until Gilmet, Draher, and Negron decided to go home for the evening and a contractor outside the bar confronted them. Despite trying to avoid a confrontation with him, the contractor struck one of the Warriors twice in the face and was in the process of throwing a third punch. In defense of his Marine brother, one of the men struck the contractor - just once - and sent him to the ground. The Marines stayed with the man for _hours_ , even bringing him back to base for medical care throughout the night after his “friends” abandoned him. The contractor tragically passed due to complications from his intoxicated state. Soon after the man’s death, the MARSOC 3 were charged with manslaughter, sending a tragic blow to their livelihoods and families. What followed was one of the most unjust trials our military justice system has ever seen. _Friend, the MARSOC 3 faced 25 years in prison for crimes they didn’t commit. They fought against bias, unlawful command influence, and intense intimidation tactics._ **With the help of United American Patriots, we were able to help secure justice for two of the Raiders!** GySgt Draher and GySgt Negron were recently found **NOT GUILTY** by a jury for negligent homicide and involuntary manslaughter. **But our work is far from over. Eric Gilmet is still facing 25 years in prison.**
---
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zuhq89j0313uagph3p83nnb8j071vd9nmadfia40_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g62ob0cjh2bs)
---
This is where you come in, Friend.
We’re asking Americans like you to step up and contribute to **UAP’s Warrior Fund** to clear Chief Petty Officer Eric Gilmet’s name.
---
[**CONTRIBUTE: $100**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3rmtjn0eu4ajbpko0jagjog91qn8hmmmf15i0ko_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g62ob0cjh2bs)
---
[**CONTRIBUTE: $75**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6tq8rga3ppk3l455desm6oft28pc1vkou7oo4so_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g62ob0cjh2bs)
---
[**CONTRIBUTE: $50**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqc90phujmpfmpc3c8ccsc3uc2j07905cupmf8vg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g62ob0cjh2bs)
---
[**CONTRIBUTE: $35**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2znbh054o73ctr6c8hde2rpnapev66v22qabprpk8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g62ob0cjh2bs)
---
[**CONTRIBUTE: OTHER**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2znamitpdpjnkklrp86nvjskr6g3hr9ru43ig40ag_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g62ob0cjh2bs)
---
Your contribution helps us support our Hero’s legal fees and expenses, investigators, and media experts. **If you can, Friend, please chip in and help us clear Eric Gilmet’s name. ** Thank you in advance for your support. Semper Fi’
---
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z098affn46vqod719qfkmp08euqn9jbplb6lrt3g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g62ob0cjh2bs)

name: American Action News
subject: The Great Reset and American liberty
body:
Does America need a “Great Reset?”

| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z69fnc4110ktfmu3a8rgboho6b0kttc4vtsei1fg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g62ob4c1h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, Does America need a “Great Reset?” In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab—the founder and executive director of the Forum—wrote, “we need a ‘Great Reset’ of capitalism.” If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life. A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives. **This seminar—titled[“The Great Reset?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrct4rdskspjk3rn9ufonn8bdgahurs6ddmqtb00_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g62ob4c1h2bs)****[”](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsv1teoug5vdmm75alhdiq06g9fdcs4s0jpmfie0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g62ob4c1h2bs)[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9fl31e97d1ctd7kin954h9dkj1oi0t6bulaajgg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g62ob4c1h2bs)—is now available as a free online video series.**

---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdtjojgu5059uvvndkgpius9mmf564t4jqln6180_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g62ob4c1h2bs)
---
| |
Filmed on the Hillsdale campus, this video series will give you insight into:
* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset
* How the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations
* The connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset
* What “environmental justice” has to do with the Great Reset
* The Great Reset from China’s perspective
* Alternatives to the Great Reset

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2d8k6ddqlj7sd7ikcop0pk0kegg8s2jmbj0ks50_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g62ob4c1h2bs)** You will learn about the Great Reset, the dangers it poses, and pro-freedom alternatives. And you can share these lessons with your family, friends, and more. As America’s economy continues to struggle in the aftermath of disastrous elite decisions, lessons like these are essential to the defense of the free market and American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are you concerned about Biden’s open border extremism?
body:
Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I’ll get straight to the point:

| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zo7b35pbq7lapdb640gggthk3hs624dusv7kc2k8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g62ob0cth2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I'll get straight to the point:

I'm writing today to invite you to join other conservatives who are pressuring lawmakers to end Biden's open border extremism by completing a simple 1-minute survey using the link below:

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvh810tgeg2u7pvqelicshd9hp404bp5k9c6p8uo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g62ob0cth2bs)**

It's critical that proactive citizens like you respond to this national poll because despite legacy media's deafening silence on the issue, **this crisis has now reached historic proportions with more than 2 million reported encounters between Border Patrol and illegal immigrants in 2022.**

This is more encounters than ever before in our nation's history--_more than double that of any year during President Donald Trump 's term._

So when people ask me what I think of Biden's immigration policy, I reply: _what immigration policy?_

Beginning the day he took office, Biden's "policies" have created one of the worst humanitarian crises our nation has ever seen.

And now, untold scores of narcotics, violent criminals, and human traffickers are being allowed to flood into American communities, practically unabated, _every single day._

Decades of success advancing conservative policies have taught us that lawmakers in Washington tend to be more responsive when they know that voters are paying attention.

**Will you help us pressure lawmakers to address this urgent matter of national security by completing a brief 1-minute survey on Immigration Reform using the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2br4n200k06le2kc5riu6u67tgf1u288klavkh0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g62ob0cth2bs)**

**Armed with your response, we will work on your behalf to turn up the pressure on lawmakers and compel them to act now.**

Let elected officials know loud and clear that **you _demand_ an end to Biden's open border extremism by completing this quick 1-minute survey using the link below:**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9kmkce80s00977h073qag7p5i3hk4p3fd5ef0qg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g62ob0cth2bs)**

Thank you,

Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

**P.S.** We must take action now--this issue cannot wait. [**Thank you for joining the fight by completing the 1-minute survey linked here. >>**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdj8vkkqpg7bo5tb0cslalfmo06ra6a1g9bk1mr0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g62ob0cth2bs)
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: Candace Owens
subject: The dark side of Black History Month
body:
It’s Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas — but have never read any of his works.

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2eo3og7f3n385lup90c9nqi0tfpvi3c08606v2g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g62ob0cjh2bs)

Friend,

It's Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works.

Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better.

It's nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America.

I don't want a Black History Month, and I can't say "why" better than Morgan Freeman did:

_" You're going to relegate my history to a month? **Black history is American history.** "_

My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities.

To teach true American history -- _and not the socialist, woke version that 's pushed today_ -- I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month.

[_**Will you join me in the push for TRUE history, Friend, by sending a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to show your support >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjkarntvutv6k594t3teq2615j80su5g7lcd6arg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g62ob0cjh2bs)

BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . .

. . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books.

. . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States.

. . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University.

That's why I hope you'll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. [_**Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgbsid09b948sjifu6ecv7l8m7sh9e2jh64480ao_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g62ob0cjh2bs)

Here's how we're reaching Black and minority communities with American history:

**BLEXIT 's Liberation Camps** provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development.

The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips.

**And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! **

Our chapter members bring BLEXIT's five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality.
1. **Advocating** for School Choice.
2. **Promoting** criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities.
3. **Championing** entrepreneurship and free enterprise.
4. **Developing** history programs that will inspire minority children.

Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences.

BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities.

Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? **Click below to send your support.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkh25hqkkehr3tbdqmqug89ofdihb2ihspu6aqho_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g62ob0cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zva9rp66mpfn3urhe30u90dvlf1fomg2qcas1vl0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g62ob0cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztb9haled81s03hetlhakkj5km1dm075dl6aanbo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g62ob0cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zaiv1pvn3236u6rul9br5hbgt6g1899c9ph40ib8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g62ob0cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztrpf67qmrq9btb87sttgcsn9352qmitm50rg3v8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g62ob0cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqis3a00i1vrh6huq9khsdpnfbs7afhel66reado_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g62ob0cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $1000 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za27qo2e43uj8bb04gok04q6ovf0l2uvd9ja6080_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g62ob0cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $2500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdkkkr2o7sh7ebkrmao19ui4mvc2luq3hnqu3vv8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g62ob0cjh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbe1f8k9vv257tp1lku4f8puajts3c2hupbf8ob0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g62ob0cjh2bs)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells!

They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z06vkbdk4bsohskfef261ggndtairlp5f60nl3i8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g62ob0cjh2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr8fl4s9i9ktcs2eqvopigon846n462e3rr8g108_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g62ob0cjh2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm5o7moatqddoorrfvp4j0162mnjogsm916hu9u8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g62ob0cjh2bs)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on. I won’t allow it.

I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you’ve given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you’ve ever given to Freedom Watch.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z23ufp7d4b7k1shg9ks70iumbt0ob2l879a6ommg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g62ob0cjh2bs)

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9g5cg46o2b1cp5qe8igg7uh2o7qr37v7ktamv7g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g62ob0cjh2bs)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit.

[But there’s something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch’s critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk6lnicluf1dr19j5k1k76j2p79b31mmj803puc0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g62ob0cjh2bs)

body:

| | | Let's set the record straight.

I fired Ilhan Omar because she was hurling anti-semitic and anti-American Remarks across social media. This is UNACCEPTABLE behavior for a member of a committee representing America on the world stage.

I fired Eric Swalwell from the intelligence committee because he became entangled with a spy for the Chinese Communist party. I do not have to explain to you why this would be a conflict of interest for someone sitting on the Intelligence Committee.

I fired Adam Schiff from the Intelligence Committee because he spread lies about Donald Trump's supposed involvement with Russia despite knowing them to be untrue at the time.
Adam Schiff leaked it?

I promised you that if we took back the majority, I would bring decency and justice to the people's House.

name: American Update
subject: Future generations are counting on your response
body:
Can you do me a favor?

Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor?
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650554%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=12DA%2bsRRCQJ3DZOMTNXZXw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s [**RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650565%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=59kVdEj5jNwVv3CNKT7srg&sysid=1) My name is Bill Gray, and I’m the Vice President of National Donor Outreach at Hillsdale College. It’s my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. **I don’t use the word “battle” lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt.** It’s clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation--a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called “progressives” seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project” is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation’s history. If you haven’t heard, the “1619 Project” places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that “all men are created equal” and endowed by God with “unalienable rights.” **“Our democracy’s founding ideals,” the “1619 Project” proclaims, “were false when they were written.”** Outrageous! _The New York Times’_ stated goal with the “1619 Project” is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery--not freedom--is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayis won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the “1619 Project” into a feature film. **Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans --and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas.** Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our** _most urgent priority._** Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. **We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective.** Hillsdale is America’s most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism--our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to efforts such as the media-driven “1619 Project” that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work--especially in 2023. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the **RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. **As _The New York Times’_ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. ** _Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible._ And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale’s work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale’s multiple educational programs--which I will outline fo**r you shortly --it has been determined that to fully implement this [RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650566%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GqnpWYpOI9mwT4RuKmifjQ&sysid=1)** for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale’s educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding--even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That’s so important, I need to say it again--Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! **In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission.** Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty--as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can--gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people--including our nation’s youth--with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650567%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KByAdHFuF9O%2b3x2fm0ypsA&sysid=1)** And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: **BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans** I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong--such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. **Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people.** You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! **BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools** In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles--AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake--Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus--they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses _free of charge_ , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous--over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” This free course is called **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called _Imprimis_ , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. _Imprimis_ is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the _Wall Street Journal_ or the “fake news” _New York Times_. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set _Imprimis_ apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an _Imprimis_ subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) **BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools** In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation’s history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. **Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year.** Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. **The response has been astounding.** We’ve now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education--education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650567%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KByAdHFuF9O%2b3x2fm0ypsA&sysid=1)**
With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans--views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left’s agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU--your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. **So please complete the[Battle Plan Survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650568%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Bj8rwa0bm7g6rh8%2b37zXEw&sysid=1) today.** When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S**. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650569%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=e9CwbhtRaPvFLtKDk%2fj%2bag&sysid=1)** to shape Hillsdale College’s defense of America against the progressive assault on history. Your response is needed within five days so we can finalize plans to expand our educational outreach on behalf of liberty.
---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1691%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=cXju8lR5su%2b%2boowURI8xkQ&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1691%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=cXju8lR5su%2b%2boowURI8xkQ&sysid=1)

name: Andrew Hughes
subject: Take a Stand Against Cancel Culture
body:
This is something he has experienced firsthand.

|
---
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvb0dabpj9eq5in7mcvmsj9fjinder05vn37oka8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g66oj4c9h2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

Dr. Carson asked me to reach out to Americans who want what's best for our country, to help him take a stand against "cancel culture." It's tearing our country apart and needs to be stopped.

This is something he has experienced firsthand.

As you may have heard, this past November the Detroit School Board voted to change the name of the Benjamin Carson High School of Science and Medicine. Why? Because the School Board was mad that Dr. Carson was part of the Trump Administration!

These educational leaders - who should be acting as role models for our kids - instead decided to create a huge political spectacle by "canceling" Dr. Carson and trying to erase his amazing achievements as a doctor, as a leader, and as a citizen. It's really outrageous.

Dr. Carson is disappointed by this - not because he wants any glory but because it sets a bad example ... for the kids at this school, and for the entire country.

"Cancel culture" tells young people and all Americans that you shouldn't listen to those with whom you disagree and try to find common ground; you should just stigmatize them and erase them.

The Left probably expected Dr. Carson to lash out at the Detroit School Board and his political opponents - hurl some insults, call people names, keep the fight going.

But instead, Dr. Carson said to our team here at the American Cornerstone Institute (ACI):

_" What if we use this as an opportunity to rally people across the country to speak out against cancel culture? To show America that we have a better path forward for our country than hate and division?"_

And that's exactly what we're doing. It's why Dr. Carson launched ACI in the first place - to lead the way for what's best for our country.

And we've created a way for you to stand with Dr. Carson and make your voice heard. Just click the link below; it will take you to our **National Statement Against Cancel Culture** that you can review and then co-sign.

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/cancel-culture-pledge](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2o2407g5685bqbve6d6l8bpms4gqcj1qav3nd8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g66oj4c9h2bs)

Dr. Carson is getting asked about the Detroit school incident quite a bit, and when he answers he wants to speak for Americans who are heartbroken by what cancel culture is doing to our country - who want this divisiveness and vitriol to end! I think you're just such an American.

And when you and thousands of concerned citizens like you sign this Statement, Dr. Carson will be able to keep speaking from the heart against cancel culture - knowing that he's broadcasting a message that is important to his fellow Americans.

He can say ... "Enough is enough! I'm fed up with cancel culture, and so are folks everywhere who love America and want what's best for the country."

If that's a message you want Dr. Carson to share on your behalf, please take a moment now to be part of ACI's **National Statement Against Cancel Culture**. Here's the link again for you:

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/cancel-culture-pledge](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zkci62kpj1tbk0e6rkp63n6mkprhsjh0p68o1h6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g66oj4c9h2bs)

Amid all the divisiveness and polarization that has been injected into our policy debates, Dr. Carson is proud of the work ACI is doing to encourage Americans to come together despite our differences and find ways to take on the challenges that face our country.

I hope you'll join Dr. Carson in this important work. Thank you!

Sincerely,

Andrew D. Hughes

name: Andrew Hughes
subject: Take a Stand Against Cancel Culture
body:
Dr. Carson asked me to reach out to Americans who want what's best for our country, to help him take a stand against "cancel culture."

|
---
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z509ccdk851u9mm6qtn6q9kl65klt589g0eek2so_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g61o34c1h2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

Dr. Carson asked me to reach out to Americans who want what's best for our country, to help him take a stand against "cancel culture." It's tearing our country apart and needs to be stopped.

This is something he has experienced firsthand.

As you may have heard, this past November the Detroit School Board voted to change the name of the Benjamin Carson High School of Science and Medicine. Why? Because the School Board was mad that Dr. Carson was part of the Trump Administration!

These educational leaders - who should be acting as role models for our kids - instead decided to create a huge political spectacle by "canceling" Dr. Carson and trying to erase his amazing achievements as a doctor, as a leader, and as a citizen. It's really outrageous.

Dr. Carson is disappointed by this - not because he wants any glory but because it sets a bad example ... for the kids at this school, and for the entire country.

"Cancel culture" tells young people and all Americans that you shouldn't listen to those with whom you disagree and try to find common ground; you should just stigmatize them and erase them.

The Left probably expected Dr. Carson to lash out at the Detroit School Board and his political opponents - hurl some insults, call people names, keep the fight going.

But instead, Dr. Carson said to our team here at the American Cornerstone Institute (ACI):

_" What if we use this as an opportunity to rally people across the country to speak out against cancel culture? To show America that we have a better path forward for our country than hate and division?"_

And that's exactly what we're doing. It's why Dr. Carson launched ACI in the first place - to lead the way for what's best for our country.

And we've created a way for you to stand with Dr. Carson and make your voice heard. Just click the link below; it will take you to our **National Statement Against Cancel Culture** that you can review and then co-sign.

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/cancel-culture-pledge](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zggvirovab8gsuggviajsvk1lktlq5lob3cisbs0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g61o34c1h2bs)

Dr. Carson is getting asked about the Detroit school incident quite a bit, and when he answers he wants to speak for Americans who are heartbroken by what cancel culture is doing to our country - who want this divisiveness and vitriol to end! I think you're just such an American.

And when you and thousands of concerned citizens like you sign this Statement, Dr. Carson will be able to keep speaking from the heart against cancel culture - knowing that he's broadcasting a message that is important to his fellow Americans.

He can say ... "Enough is enough! I'm fed up with cancel culture, and so are folks everywhere who love America and want what's best for the country."

If that's a message you want Dr. Carson to share on your behalf, please take a moment now to be part of ACI's **National Statement Against Cancel Culture**. Here's the link again for you:

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/cancel-culture-pledge](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2f2uhq9gse35a92u05b75lajmrgrv8ufohcq40g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g61o34c1h2bs)

Amid all the divisiveness and polarization that has been injected into our policy debates, Dr. Carson is proud of the work ACI is doing to encourage Americans to come together despite our differences and find ways to take on the challenges that face our country.

I hope you'll join Dr. Carson in this important work. Thank you!

Sincerely,

Andrew D. Hughes
Executive Director & CEO
American Cornerstone Institute

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells!

They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2r9u4c8ehp3epdeij2r3rddr29amogvveoahn98_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g61o32c1h2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5o0sbm4fk02bir7jceso6sdhkhru4k9oftuate0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g61o32c1h2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhnamojs8pvh488cbh2rjnffc36u3h3v3h5m4ve0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g61o32c1h2bs)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on. I won’t allow it.

I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you’ve given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you’ve ever given to Freedom Watch.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl5555vut04d6e7abhutstih15foev94os0mplco_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g61o32c1h2bs)

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv7hqc0q3b40l1s7lp5g5odvliuiqte4qu1fa6fg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g61o32c1h2bs)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit.

[But there’s something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch’s critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zemvmqpod9et9qhe6i5pm3pcgbquvs3ck5fuftp0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g61o32c1h2bs)
---

Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them. Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency). There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying. And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA. They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment! This can’t go on. I won’t allow it. I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch. I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years. You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton. And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others. Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court! I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN! And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court. Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people. Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous. I can’t do it without you, Patriot. Thank you for doing whatever you can now. Sincerely, Larry Klayman Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc. P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship! Free the January 6 Protestors! ** Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy! At least one January 6 protestor has already died. And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit. name: Andrew Hughes
subject: Take a Stand Against Cancel Culture
body:
This is something he has experienced firsthand.

|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zn2vgni9orambceaqob64cb9gi82q9ragvag0a60_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g61o34chh2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

Dr. Carson asked me to reach out to Americans who want what's best for our country, to help him take a stand against "cancel culture." It's tearing our country apart and needs to be stopped.

This is something he has experienced firsthand.

As you may have heard, this past November the Detroit School Board voted to change the name of the Benjamin Carson High School of Science and Medicine. Why? Because the School Board was mad that Dr. Carson was part of the Trump Administration!

These educational leaders - who should be acting as role models for our kids - instead decided to create a huge political spectacle by "canceling" Dr. Carson and trying to erase his amazing achievements as a doctor, as a leader, and as a citizen. It's really outrageous.

Dr. Carson is disappointed by this - not because he wants any glory but because it sets a bad example ... for the kids at this school, and for the entire country.

"Cancel culture" tells young people and all Americans that you shouldn't listen to those with whom you disagree and try to find common ground; you should just stigmatize them and erase them.

The Left probably expected Dr. Carson to lash out at the Detroit School Board and his political opponents - hurl some insults, call people names, keep the fight going.

But instead, Dr. Carson said to our team here at the American Cornerstone Institute (ACI):

_" What if we use this as an opportunity to rally people across the country to speak out against cancel culture? To show America that we have a better path forward for our country than hate and division?"_

And that's exactly what we're doing. It's why Dr. Carson launched ACI in the first place - to lead the way for what's best for our country.

And we've created a way for you to stand with Dr. Carson and make your voice heard. Just click the link below; it will take you to our **National Statement Against Cancel Culture** that you can review and then co-sign.

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/cancel-culture-pledge](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9ugn78k61g71acn945fc50g13mtfblumbcjpki8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g61o34chh2bs)

Dr. Carson is getting asked about the Detroit school incident quite a bit, and when he answers he wants to speak for Americans who are heartbroken by what cancel culture is doing to our country - who want this divisiveness and vitriol to end! I think you're just such an American.

And when you and thousands of concerned citizens like you sign this Statement, Dr. Carson will be able to keep speaking from the heart against cancel culture - knowing that he's broadcasting a message that is important to his fellow Americans.

He can say ... "Enough is enough! I'm fed up with cancel culture, and so are folks everywhere who love America and want what's best for the country."

If that's a message you want Dr. Carson to share on your behalf, please take a moment now to be part of ACI's **National Statement Against Cancel Culture**. Here's the link again for you:

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/cancel-culture-pledge](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zfmh5shaqplhn78spjefhvdnh6qaa8vgr0okjpn0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g61o34chh2bs)

Amid all the divisiveness and polarization that has been injected into our policy debates, Dr. Carson is proud of the work ACI is doing to encourage Americans to come together despite our differences and find ways to take on the challenges that face our country.

I hope you'll join Dr. Carson in this important work. Thank you!

Sincerely,

Andrew D. Hughes
Executive Director & CEO
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
Does America need a “Great Reset?” In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy.

| | | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zj7t4683mk0g08re4m5j618hkpuo69ml7v8ulej0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g61o34cjh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, Does America need a “Great Reset?” In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab—the founder and executive director of the Forum—wrote, “we need a ‘Great Reset’ of capitalism.” If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life. A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives. **This seminar—titled[“The Great Reset?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2lu2621rctcsvm9eat6fltvr8lbcsg567mde9qg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g61o34cjh2bs)****[”](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfs2ojkn5tlnu6p7ep9d676tdkimrflnpu6aanig_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g61o34cjh2bs)[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z4kr3uo8lcre5hmphcqri6dpts6hf6dtom73qk90_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g61o34cjh2bs)—is now available as a free online video series.**

---
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8b98h0eln84d59ifplo16flrvh7o6amdaj6msb0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g61o34cjh2bs)
---
| |
Filmed on the Hillsdale campus, this video series will give you insight into:
* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset
* How the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations
* The connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset
* What “environmental justice” has to do with the Great Reset
* The Great Reset from China’s perspective
* Alternatives to the Great Reset

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6dtc0tla2qj0p59b2schjqappgmcg5ituj9e1uo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g61o34cjh2bs)** You will learn about the Great Reset, the dangers it poses, and pro-freedom alternatives. And you can share these lessons with your family, friends, and more. As America’s economy continues to struggle in the aftermath of disastrous elite decisions, lessons like these are essential to the defense of the free market and American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Andrew Hughes
subject: Should Dr. Ben Carson Be Canceled?
body:
This is something he has experienced firsthand.

|
---
| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zi92pjlub269as52kffr0d1e22m1jij88d409bqo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g69o76c9h2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

Dr. Carson asked me to reach out to Americans who want what's best for our country, to help him take a stand against "cancel culture." It's tearing our country apart and needs to be stopped.

This is something he has experienced firsthand.

As you may have heard, this past November the Detroit School Board voted to change the name of the Benjamin Carson High School of Science and Medicine. Why? Because the School Board was mad that Dr. Carson was part of the Trump Administration!

These educational leaders - who should be acting as role models for our kids - instead decided to create a huge political spectacle by "canceling" Dr. Carson and trying to erase his amazing achievements as a doctor, as a leader, and as a citizen. It's really outrageous.

Dr. Carson is disappointed by this - not because he wants any glory but because it sets a bad example ... for the kids at this school, and for the entire country.

"Cancel culture" tells young people and all Americans that you shouldn't listen to those with whom you disagree and try to find common ground; you should just stigmatize them and erase them.

The Left probably expected Dr. Carson to lash out at the Detroit School Board and his political opponents - hurl some insults, call people names, keep the fight going.

But instead, Dr. Carson said to our team here at the American Cornerstone Institute (ACI):

_" What if we use this as an opportunity to rally people across the country to speak out against cancel culture? To show America that we have a better path forward for our country than hate and division?"_

And that's exactly what we're doing. It's why Dr. Carson launched ACI in the first place - to lead the way for what's best for our country.

And we've created a way for you to stand with Dr. Carson and make your voice heard. Just click the link below; it will take you to our **National Statement Against Cancel Culture** that you can review and then co-sign.

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/cancel-culture-pledge](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zaqksfjt9psnbr357r1kvfs3jsrr04uk9sevubsg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g69o76c9h2bs)

Dr. Carson is getting asked about the Detroit school incident quite a bit, and when he answers he wants to speak for Americans who are heartbroken by what cancel culture is doing to our country - who want this divisiveness and vitriol to end! I think you're just such an American.

And when you and thousands of concerned citizens like you sign this Statement, Dr. Carson will be able to keep speaking from the heart against cancel culture - knowing that he's broadcasting a message that is important to his fellow Americans.

He can say ... "Enough is enough! I'm fed up with cancel culture, and so are folks everywhere who love America and want what's best for the country."

If that's a message you want Dr. Carson to share on your behalf, please take a moment now to be part of ACI's **National Statement Against Cancel Culture**. Here's the link again for you:

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/cancel-culture-pledge](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze5juf4ub5s4jnhv56c8qqlk1j5rme8bg6f6l56g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3g69o76c9h2bs)

Amid all the divisiveness and polarization that has been injected into our policy debates, Dr. Carson is proud of the work ACI is doing to encourage Americans to come together despite our differences and find ways to take on the challenges that face our country.

I hope you'll join Dr. Carson in this important work. Thank you!

Sincerely,

Andrew D. Hughes
Executive Director & CEO
American Cornerstone Institute

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Bring Constitution 101 to your home
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy.

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrchobokd71u69h72vjr5kb1er88u08nbce3fhio_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3i68or6c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8gdt3rr1k9n2coth89kua0uhqqvvfdso0clmma8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3i68or6c1h2bs) I hope you're having a great day so far. Today, I'm writing to let you know that we've produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our "Constitution 101" course, and I'd like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College's world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. "Constitution 101" is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7iipi5kts4thjctr7n4grhkidm0eoida31m73e8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3i68or6c1h2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new "Constitution 101" DVD box set are limited, so I hope you'll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844

name: Andrew Hughes
subject: Take a Stand Against Cancel Culture
body:
This is something he has experienced firsthand.

|
---
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjt7le43m1hhdmmc0vr4lrs4bi6h7cfbknuq10h8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3i68or6c9h2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

Dr. Carson asked me to reach out to Americans who want what's best for our country, to help him take a stand against "cancel culture." It's tearing our country apart and needs to be stopped.

This is something he has experienced firsthand.

As you may have heard, this past November the Detroit School Board voted to change the name of the Benjamin Carson High School of Science and Medicine. Why? Because the School Board was mad that Dr. Carson was part of the Trump Administration!

These educational leaders - who should be acting as role models for our kids - instead decided to create a huge political spectacle by "canceling" Dr. Carson and trying to erase his amazing achievements as a doctor, as a leader, and as a citizen. It's really outrageous.

Dr. Carson is disappointed by this - not because he wants any glory but because it sets a bad example ... for the kids at this school, and for the entire country.

"Cancel culture" tells young people and all Americans that you shouldn't listen to those with whom you disagree and try to find common ground; you should just stigmatize them and erase them.

The Left probably expected Dr. Carson to lash out at the Detroit School Board and his political opponents - hurl some insults, call people names, keep the fight going.

But instead, Dr. Carson said to our team here at the American Cornerstone Institute (ACI):

_" What if we use this as an opportunity to rally people across the country to speak out against cancel culture? To show America that we have a better path forward for our country than hate and division?"_

And that's exactly what we're doing. It's why Dr. Carson launched ACI in the first place - to lead the way for what's best for our country.

And we've created a way for you to stand with Dr. Carson and make your voice heard. Just click the link below; it will take you to our **National Statement Against Cancel Culture** that you can review and then co-sign.

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/cancel-culture-pledge](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkvcg5r7rg75b4mcurm43f4ht24af79f1scl536o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3i68or6c9h2bs)

Dr. Carson is getting asked about the Detroit school incident quite a bit, and when he answers he wants to speak for Americans who are heartbroken by what cancel culture is doing to our country - who want this divisiveness and vitriol to end! I think you're just such an American.

And when you and thousands of concerned citizens like you sign this Statement, Dr. Carson will be able to keep speaking from the heart against cancel culture - knowing that he's broadcasting a message that is important to his fellow Americans.

He can say ... "Enough is enough! I'm fed up with cancel culture, and so are folks everywhere who love America and want what's best for the country."

If that's a message you want Dr. Carson to share on your behalf, please take a moment now to be part of ACI's **National Statement Against Cancel Culture**. Here's the link again for you:

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/cancel-culture-pledge](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhbrmq84bp60paoqi2t5g4etg21dp6siiihb5980_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c3i68or6c9h2bs)

Amid all the divisiveness and polarization that has been injected into our policy debates, Dr. Carson is proud of the work ACI is doing to encourage Americans to come together despite our differences and find ways to take on the challenges that face our country.

I hope you'll join Dr. Carson in this important work. Thank you!

Sincerely,

Andrew D. Hughes
Executive Director & CEO
American Cornerstone Institute
---
