name: Becca Balint
subject: Unbought and unbossed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont, P
body:
February is Black History Month — and I’ve been thinking a lot about Shirley Chisholm.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58939528/392744737/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGMzNjk5MS02ZmIwLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ei4g66v7vtNv8wdPU4ApRoRDsUVPS8RDDi702HID_Rg=&emci=2aa53904-e5ae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=68c36991-6fb0-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) | Peter, February is Black History Month — and I’ve been thinking a lot about one of my heroes, Shirley Chisholm. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58939530/392744743/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGMzNjk5MS02ZmIwLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ei4g66v7vtNv8wdPU4ApRoRDsUVPS8RDDi702HID_Rg=&emci=2aa53904-e5ae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=68c36991-6fb0-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) Shirley exuded a beautiful confidence and political brilliance that pushed her to run for Congress without the backing of Democratic Party leadership. And in 1968, she won — becoming the first Black woman to serve in the United States House of Representatives. Her legacy and impact grew exponentially from there. Her campaign slogan was “unbought and unbossed.” When she got to Capitol Hill, she was unwavering in her commitment to racial justice, gender equity, and economic justice. She was known for pushing her way into spaces traditionally reserved for white men – bucking the status quo at every turn and earning herself the nickname “Fighting Shirley.” Shirley was not one to wait for permission. In 1972, she made waves again when she ran for president, the first Black American to seek a major party presidential nomination. Fast forward to today, and we’re still fighting to realize Shirley’s dream of putting a woman in the White House — though we are lucky to have the first Black woman serving as our Vice President. **Shirley’s vision and hard work allowed future generations of Americans (transitionally on the margins) to see themselves in public office as their own advocates, champions, and representatives. Her life’s work is a critical chapter not just in Black history, but in American history, and her story and impact must continue to be taught. ** Black history is full of leaders and triumphs, but it also includes pain and oppression. It is essential that we understand the entire story, because right now, in 2023, we have not achieved the promise of equality and justice for all. Not yet. **This Black History Month, we celebrate Black Vermonters, Americans, and historical figures like Shirley. And we work this month, and every month, towards a nation as good as its promise.** Thank you, Becca Balint
---

* * *

| | We’re preparing our budgets to determine just how much we can invest in protecting the freedom to vote in Georgia this year in the lead-up to 2024. No matter when Georgia is set to vote in the presidential primaries next year, we know this: **Georgia will continue to be a key battleground state for national elections.** The past few elections have proven just how critical Georgia voters are to the national electorate, from securing the presidency to strengthening the pro-democracy majority in the U.S. Senate. That’s why it’s essential that we raise as much as we can and invest now in the resources we need to challenge GOP voter suppression attempts and ensure a free and fair election next year. [_**Before we wrap up the week, we’re hoping to raise enough grassroots donations to start shaping our budgets. With a $20 donation, here’s what you could provide in the fight to protect the freedom to vote:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58956332/392780501/-249094500?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230219_f_tangible3_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGViNWUyYy1hMGIwLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gSyJCp8T1Oq0MFTbNU83MDa8slA71E_R2fd7rVGgOp4=) ✓ **$10** could help respond to an issue at a polling location

clean_body: That’s why your contribution is so important right now. | | | We’re preparing our budgets to determine just how much we can invest in protecting the freedom to vote in Georgia this year in the lead-up to 2024. No matter when Georgia is set to vote in the presidential primaries next year, we know this: Georgia will continue to be a key battleground state for national elections. The past few elections have proven just how critical Georgia voters are to the national electorate, from securing the presidency to strengthening the pro-democracy majority in the U.S. Senate. That’s why it’s essential that we raise as much as we can and invest now in the resources we need to challenge GOP voter suppression attempts and ensure a free and fair election next year. = ✓ $10 could help respond to an issue at a polling location ✓ $25 could fund calls to reach hundreds of voters ✓ $50 could provide educational materials to help thousands of voters get to their polling places ✓ $100 could host a volunteer training to ultimately turn out hundreds of voters | = Thanks! | | Dear Fellow American,
Does America need a "Great Reset?"
In 2020, members of the world's elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy.
As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "we need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life.
A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives.
**This seminar --titled ["The Great Reset?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6b628a72ef9d4c4386074272446d4ff3&_e=9nn56EI34WHZPeeT05A1o3N80GtIWlDD1Z9BOiqTuRlRduZuDIaSscpDa2cszc073UQqYHEehR9KA_j2ak_U0kmyb4-FbN7cl4RMv9t_UutlIKVAj1xbVmDl3XCZtxliTUgmlGUHqNax6Rfk7J-NNBBVI-tFPv7Ey1dqDIUmb4J-bexGVOpKt6231aAgtOFg_aZ-RRQ_AHpsFSx8EEI80sQk1WeZIhCBXsWScZHE5aCaCH3l7T9tPhd_Tn7MSoR8AnYdOjq1GwWxGZT3IhoitBOcyizx9QtBmM_vAIHhh1SjemMyKdzsDOoNEKi5GOarOh-dHxKJY_09zuMuf66CTb7JVaAfiGibN_ptIkbCmun_42htoj9dVQozZ3sWb6zi)****["](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6b628a72ef9d4c4386074272446d4ff3&_e=9nn56EI34WHZPeeT05A1o3N80GtIWlDD1Z9BOiqTuRlRduZuDIaSscpDa2cszc073UQqYHEehR9KA_j2ak_U0kmyb4-FbN7cl4RMv9t_UutlIKVAj1xbVmDl3XCZtxliTUgmlGUHqNax6Rfk7J-NNBBVI-tFPv7Ey1dqDIUmb4J-bexGVOpKt6231aAgtOFg_aZ-RRQ_AHpsFSx8EEI80sQk1WeZIhCBXsWScZHE5aCPwquY00dFmjc5K3KOTl7q200C1f42k_VMkCSmR_BQs27wA77Y97U46UIa_cqQ2MzPNV9N1UEkHDQBAkYmNlD-W5VkAkG-WSHfgU_hfj_EbidVl3Mf1TX1Y7b9woZTgK2yzrmk4YR1n12rzDrfWJxv) --is now available as a free online video series.**

* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset
* How the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large corporations

name: David Trone
subject: A reminder about mental health
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Congress, Inc
body:
Peter,
You may have seen in the news last week that Senator John Fetterman voluntarily checked himself into the hospital for treatment of clinical depression. Above all else, June and I are thinking of the Senator and his family — and we’re grateful that he had the courage to seek help when he needed it. We look forward to seeing him back to work when he’s ready to do so.
This should serve as a reminder to all of us of the importance of mental health. This is a growing crisis, worsening for decades, and skyrocketing throughout the pandemic. Senator Fetterman’s incredible show of strength — admitting that he needed help — is a lesson for all those who struggle: there is absolutely no shame in asking for help and getting the treatment you need.
Like so many of you, I have loved ones and friends who struggle with their mental health. It’s because of their stories, and the countless stories I’ve heard during my time in Congress, that I fight each and every day to expand access to mental healthcare. You have my word that this issue is my number one priority in Congress.
Thankfully, help is available if you or someone you love is struggling with mental health. Here are a few resources to be aware of. Be sure to share this with friends and neighbors who may find it useful:
*
If
you’re
considering
harming
yourself
,
dial
988.
*
If
you’re
concerned
for
someone
else’s
safety
,
dial
911.
*
If
you’re
struggling
with
substance
use
,
contact
the
SAMHSA
National
Hotline
at
1-800-662-4357.
*
If
you’re
a
veteran
struggling
with
mental
health,
contact
the
MCV
Hotline
at
1-877-770-4801.
*
To
find
treatment
for
mental
health
near
you,
visit
findtreatment.gov.
[http://findtreatment.gov]
Remember: It’s okay not to be okay. And help is here for you if and when you need it. If my team and I can ever be of assistance, don’t hesitate to contact us by emailing info@davidtrone.com [info@davidtrone.com] .
Sincerely,
David
Paid for by David Trone for Congress, Inc.
David Trone For Congress
P.O. Box 83998
Gaithersburg, MD 20883-3998
United States

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are you concerned about Biden’s open border extremism?
body:
I’m writing today to invite you to join other conservatives who are pressuring lawmakers to end Biden’s open border extremism

| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a449fc4b474442669888dcfcf13205f5&_e=whwaqQ0GYV5PCKc1B5BA6FDzgy0C-L5hiZ1dtf7IlRKc4LwPtb2fQuQvBCbflDLojC9FF-8ra0JCFVthUZEiaB6-HAKqmkj9XoOGzq7fpu_Rva2m14GC_AzvtnQqtSQYHWYjcQlZycZ2mPdC-ikyp4HGtX4svqR5JTehQ_IBKfUnnIckTEtUPED1DUoJ6ciIuJ0s4Apyv5N0je8pgGKn-6K0_eRWunfjBcdeK7Vo_ZooEDTyhnVrebeLsuoPBQdJZSjCSy1n0WwF52MmMDuesiQnMUrZgsaptOPqBDW15FVohmROdh-OlAM3HLtC-FKMyEnqcm5S7cj8tlym3jxArmzFNNlu2GlD9OENaE08h71YRfm_uapHnatTLz3R5l3t)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I'll get straight to the point:

I'm writing today to invite you to join other conservatives who are pressuring lawmakers to end Biden's open border extremism by completing a simple 1-minute survey using the link below:

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a449fc4b474442669888dcfcf13205f5&_e=whwaqQ0GYV5PCKc1B5BA6FDzgy0C-L5hiZ1dtf7IlRKc4LwPtb2fQuQvBCbflDLojC9FF-8ra0JCFVthUZEiaB6-HAKqmkj9XoOGzq7fpu_Rva2m14GC_AzvtnQqtSQYHWYjcQlZycZ2mPdC-ikyp4HGtX4svqR5JTehQ_IBKfUnnIckTEtUPED1DUoJ6ciIuJ0s4Apyv5N0je8pgGKn-6K0_eRWunfjBcdeK7Vo_Zp5PfsupyR32G8W7QOaVDFIF3a1JrHV0cn-v_zfY4e9OyHY3yJrpAWvPncnR0vCp1JwOmRou9aux8HUphiyGCp9Tx32Dllw40oOSoK6ctLExNXxBLcaQlEISJW-WAvOtIbv63El5Vy1xu3pqUfFHgf_)**

It's critical that proactive citizens like you respond to this national poll because despite legacy media's deafening silence on the issue, **this crisis has now reached historic proportions with more than 2 million reported encounters between Border Patrol and illegal immigrants in 2022.**

This is more encounters than ever before in our nation's history--_more than double that of any year during President Donald Trump 's term._

So when people ask me what I think of Biden's immigration policy, I reply: _what immigration policy?_

Beginning the day he took office, Biden's "policies" have created one of the worst humanitarian crises our nation has ever seen.

And now, untold scores of narcotics, violent criminals, and human traffickers are being allowed to flood into American communities, practically unabated, _every single day._

Decades of success advancing conservative policies have taught us that lawmakers in Washington tend to be more responsive when they know that voters are paying attention.

**Will you help us pressure lawmakers to address this urgent matter of national security by completing a brief 1-minute survey on Immigration Reform using the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a449fc4b474442669888dcfcf13205f5&_e=whwaqQ0GYV5PCKc1B5BA6FDzgy0C-L5hiZ1dtf7IlRKc4LwPtb2fQuQvBCbflDLojC9FF-8ra0JCFVthUZEiaB6-HAKqmkj9XoOGzq7fpu_Rva2m14GC_AzvtnQqtSQYHWYjcQlZycZ2mPdC-ikyp4HGtX4svqR5JTehQ_IBKfUnnIckTEtUPED1DUoJ6ciIuJ0s4Apyv5N0je8pgGKn-6K0_eRWunfjBcdeK7Vo_ZrbtVIcnt3QO8zuNnORHIDZMp21OE4_Fpp9hy7bQvB9bQGL_RnyA9Loaa9e-4jIA-oksU8HZSYpFCOJB_3OqX6s3T15IMfHOZmxDSollDKsO18RvwkcwV41ba5wTMU9oAnQR-t3MHBlK2rPUF8MKntV)**

**Armed with your response, we will work on your behalf to turn up the pressure on lawmakers and compel them to act now.**

Let elected officials know loud and clear that **you _demand_ an end to Biden's open border extremism by completing this quick 1-minute survey using the link below:**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a449fc4b474442669888dcfcf13205f5&_e=whwaqQ0GYV5PCKc1B5BA6FDzgy0C-L5hiZ1dtf7IlRKc4LwPtb2fQuQvBCbflDLojC9FF-8ra0JCFVthUZEiaB6-HAKqmkj9XoOGzq7fpu_Rva2m14GC_AzvtnQqtSQYHWYjcQlZycZ2mPdC-ikyp4HGtX4svqR5JTehQ_IBKfUnnIckTEtUPED1DUoJ6ciIuJ0s4Apyv5N0je8pgGKn-6K0_eRWunfjBcdeK7Vo_ZoyP9N2ccKuMgFqiqY_72ITivRGc2l7aaWpKIUUJnOvZX13dUx3Q0wlhZ7lkZutt8TeD-wlCboHQdB7P0-DHhr5SFgkzC8ig8r6Bj1Z_RM2wRrmZsh1B9WtHcL871BPTWDPZDoKV9Hqqr7Xxy6ofdtP)**

Thank you,

Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

**P.S.** We must take action now--this issue cannot wait. [**Thank you for joining the fight by completing the 1-minute survey linked here. >>**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a449fc4b474442669888dcfcf13205f5&_e=whwaqQ0GYV5PCKc1B5BA6FDzgy0C-L5hiZ1dtf7IlRKc4LwPtb2fQuQvBCbflDLojC9FF-8ra0JCFVthUZEiaB6-HAKqmkj9XoOGzq7fpu_Rva2m14GC_AzvtnQqtSQYHWYjcQlZycZ2mPdC-ikyp4HGtX4svqR5JTehQ_IBKfUnnIckTEtUPED1DUoJ6ciIuJ0s4Apyv5N0je8pgGKn-6K0_eRWunfjBcdeK7Vo_ZqybR8WH4Wr3auCQiB2aJAGRALRGQEGoZ1vpkews_l9Ubtwyhv7LmFz9IUb68GJqIgug3T0L1dCO4QLaAwFvlI2aG8SGk3i3xKjHo9tsl_sw3VQlFOgcznKoQGxPUmsVplq2j_LvQUl1ebFLJde0AGk)
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

body:
Mark your calendars for these important conservative events taking place for our Will and McHenry County Republicans, and one for Rep. Mary Miller!

Mark Your Calendars for these Upcoming Events!

We would like to make you aware of some important upcoming events.

This Saturday, February 25, we have some important fundraisers taking place, one to support critical races in Will County, where our Publisher Scott Kaspar will be speaking.

Also, this Saturday is a benefit for McHenry County Republicans featuring Turning Point USA Founder Charlie Kirk.

Then, on March 17, our Publisher Scott Kaspar is co-hosting a fundraiser for Congresswoman Mary Miller.

# Senate Republicans Introduce "A More Affordable New York" Plan
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ETxu4HeYN9Mq9TuEwWauu7z8Yytfezi7vT17dGte9ELfD40ekXTo_DIi3gbnC4t25yyG8NPdLaPhA8JDtmFoRrWY38cR3PQrwRspETNGfTttCy8s_i25yTecZkM4Qm2_jV4h2xabDzIn1MR6HVXWYY1eSKwedXWJpfhDgO7TO9drBXD14172E4R7NqYg5RCkq1cO2kcpMgruw38-zOv5ulpZFvuHBSXCxWfsFn2hx2j9Sll_i-FgmA01aHrcLgGK3JSGF_bQCnv7k0Czi9jKzPwzeG9pGqXwjh-iulHNVuqHZO-8YNwCGT01LvAhT0DTZ36jrGzGc7UOJIi0k8e7pPukLXOlFLC4&c=P7PKXheo_KOJ_zBjyDmtcBiNhxF68SK5mRmW7bbMnrIlBbvso12gqQ==&ch=6Fz4BcFXoT-TVorTQNp4bFwvtPIlBWYeOoLGLi2LTiQPQFBAUtVxKQ==)
---
"Eliminating the enhanced Medicaid payments to local governments, which would create enormous pressure to increase local property taxes. This is gonna have an absolutely horrendous impact, it's gonna blow holes in almost every county budget out there," says Ortt. Senator Ortt also listed increasing unemployment insurance taxes on struggling small businesses and farms, increasing payroll taxes in the MTA region, and using state funding for immigration in NYC.
"While seniors on fixed incomes worry about their heating bills, they're moving to ban fossil fuel hookups to new and existing buildings and drive utility costs up even further," says Ortt. Under the, "A More Affordable New York" initiative, Republicans say they will eliminate costly unfunded mandates that drive up local property taxes, repealing Congestion Pricing, and providing relief from heating costs geared toward the middle class.
---

# New York Post - Hochul slammed as 'out of touch' with gas stove ban on agenda of $227B NY budget hearing

Republican criticism of the climate proposals is part of broader attacks on the draft spending plan, which would also ban fossil fuel heating systems in new buildings by 2035, ahead of the April 1 budget deadline. "The policies coming from the governor and her allies on the left aren't just bad policies," Ortt said at a press conference alongside GOP colleagues. "They are irresponsibly, out-of-touch with the reality that most New Yorkers are facing - and it's the key indicator why people are leaving the state of New York."

Ortt, who said utility companies have informed his environmental positions, highlighted Monday how Hochul is also pushing to divert local Medicaid funding to state coffers alongside efforts to implement congestion pricing and increase the MTA payroll tax on employees, all of which Republicans argue will hit the bottom lines of New Yorkers amid historically high inflation. The Republican leader acknowledged that many of the proposed policies could lead to savings for consumers "over 25 or 30 years" while adding that such relief would not come soon enough for many people in the short term.

clean_body: Sunday, February 19th Edition | | | | == | Follow Rob Ortt on Social Media: | == == == | Weekly Newsletter | February 19th, 2023 | Issue L | | | | | Senate Republicans Introduce "A More Affordable New York" Plan == "Eliminating the enhanced Medicaid payments to local governments, which would create enormous pressure to increase local property taxes. This is gonna have an absolutely horrendous impact, it's gonna blow holes in almost every county budget out there," says Ortt. Senator Ortt also listed increasing unemployment insurance taxes on struggling small businesses and farms, increasing payroll taxes in the MTA region, and using state funding for immigration in NYC. "While seniors on fixed incomes worry about their heating bills, they're moving to ban fossil fuel hookups to new and existing buildings and drive utility costs up even further," says Ortt. Under the, "A More Affordable New York" initiative, Republicans say they will eliminate costly unfunded mandates that drive up local property taxes, repealing Congestion Pricing, and providing relief from heating costs geared toward the middle class. | == | | | In The News: | | | == ---|--- | New York Post - Hochul slammed as 'out of touch' with gas stove ban on agenda of $227B NY budget hearing Republican criticism of the climate proposals is part of broader attacks on the draft spending plan, which would also ban fossil fuel heating systems in new buildings by 2035, ahead of the April 1 budget deadline. "The policies coming from the governor and her allies on the left aren't just bad policies," Ortt said at a press conference alongside GOP colleagues. "They are irresponsibly, out-of-touch with the reality that most New Yorkers are facing - and it's the key indicator why people are leaving the state of New York." Ortt, who said utility companies have informed his environmental positions, highlighted Monday how Hochul is also pushing to divert local Medicaid funding to state coffers alongside efforts to implement congestion pricing and increase the MTA payroll tax on employees, all of which Republicans argue will hit the bottom lines of New Yorkers amid historically high inflation. The Republican leader acknowledged that many of the proposed policies could lead to savings for consumers "over 25 or 30 years" while adding that such relief would not come soon enough for many people in the short term. | == == | == It's like Deja vu all over again... but it doesn't have to be this way. The Republican Senate Conference is ready to come together and put a public safety plan in place that will York. Fellow Conservative,

_**The NRA is the ONLY organization standing in the way of widespread gun confiscation.**

Gun controllers in Congress want to severely restrict or completely eliminate the right to keep and bear arms. And, it's no secret that we can't trust most politicians in Washington to protect our Second Amendment rights when the going gets tough._

Our team is working tirelessly to protect the American people from the gun-grabbers in the government, but we can't do it without your help. clean_body: We really want to hear your thoughts | As America’s longest-standing civil rights organization, there’s nothing the NRA cares about more than getting to know its supporters. We are helping NRA fundraise. Questions? 1(800)662-3888 | Friend, As America's longest-standing civil rights organization, there's nothing the NRA cares about more than getting to know its supporters. That's why Wayne LaPierre recently sent you our exclusive Official Survey on Gun Registration. In order to best fight for the wants and needs of America's gun owners, we need to know them on a personal level. And that includes you, Fellow Conservative. Our hard-working team at the NRA is deeply committed to protecting the American people from radical gun-grabbers in the federal, state, and local governments. In order to best serve your needs, we need to hear your input. Completing this important survey will only take a few minutes, but those few minutes will make a huge difference in the fight to save the Second Amendment. We made the personalized link below just for you, but it's expiring soon. Give us your input while you still can. Thank you, National Rifle Association Headquarters \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Wayne LaPierre Subject: The NRA will always stand up for your rights Fellow Conservative, The NRA is the ONLY organization standing in the way of widespread gun confiscation. Gun controllers in Congress want to severely restrict or completely eliminate the right to keep and bear arms. And, it's no secret that we can't trust most politicians in Washington to protect our Second Amendment rights when the going gets tough. Our team is working tirelessly to protect the American people from the gun-grabbers in the government, but we can't do it without your help. #
Peter, It’s Ben Wikler, the Chair of the Democratic Party of Wisconsin, and **[I’m writing to ask you to make a contribution -_$10 or whatever you can afford_ \- before our primary on Tuesday.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58952149/392761636/170564638?refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230219_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZThmZGVhNS03ZmIwLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NngYSZwOMW9GTfNN_XePWbh2BFg291irPv_OX7gEOuY=) ** Here’s the truth: **All of the national outlets are saying abortion access and voting rights are on the ballot this April in Wisconsin. ** To top it all off, reporters are saying Wisconsin’s state Supreme Court election is expected to top all-time spending records. Wisconsinites are casting their ballots right now, and we need to make sure we mobilize good Democratic voters for candidates who will protect access to reproductive health care and our very democracy. Our opponents have super PACs and Republican millionaires pouring millions of dollars into attack ads to sway this race. But we have each other. And that’s how we’re going to continue our momentum from November and win again. Congress begins its first public hearings on President Joe Biden's family, including Hunter and his ties to foreign companies.

Any one of these stories would've been widely covered if it was a Republican President's son, but the left-wing media has been almost completely silent.

subject: Can you help me and Rashida fight hate with love?

body:
Rashida and I will never give up in our collective struggle for justice |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58957532/392784930/-1230998127?refcode=em230219-1-30-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGMxZjVkYi1hZWIwLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kxecqLhtijNhH-RPKiZ_wJb3-N3y_igewK7ynX-ohKI=&emci=c7c1f5db-aeb0-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=c8c1f5db-aeb0-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=35610790)
---
Friends — In just a minute, I'm going to ask you to [**split a contribution — of $5 or anything you can — between my sister in service Rashida Tlaib and our campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58957533/392784931/272233028?refcode2=c8c1f5db-aeb0-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&refcode=em230219-1-30-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGMxZjVkYi1hZWIwLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kxecqLhtijNhH-RPKiZ_wJb3-N3y_igewK7ynX-ohKI=) Let me explain why this ask is so important, especially today: Even before our first term in Congress together in 2019, Rashida and I both have been driven by our commitment to the communities we serve, and to improving the lives of working people all across this country. We're both immensely proud of the progress our movement has made, and to be able to serve as role models for women, people of color, Muslims, immigrants, and people of all marginalized backgrounds and identities as we fight for policies to move our country forward. But as the first Muslim women in Congress, it hasn't always been easy. We've had to endure a lot. Together Rashida and I have faced countless death threats, constant harassment, and even violent threats from our colleagues in the House of Representatives — not to mention millions of dollars in outside campaign spending from bigoted, dark-money special interests hellbent on silencing our voices. You may remember earlier this month, when Kevin McCarthy and the Republican Party voted to kick me off the House Foreign Affairs Committee. It was a cowardly act of revenge, and served to rally the right wing and weaponize hate against anyone who shares my background. We already know that these attacks are just beginning, and that Rashida and I are two of the GOP's top targets this campaign cycle. That's because of who we are, and who we fight for. It's so important that our progressive movement continue to stand together in solidarity as we always have, and be ready for what's next — which is why I have to ask: **[**Can you split a contribution — of $5 or anything you can — between mine and Rashida's campaigns for Congress today? Together we can continue to build a future based on love, not hate.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58957534/392784932/272233028?refcode2=c8c1f5db-aeb0-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&refcode=em230219-1-30-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGMxZjVkYi1hZWIwLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kxecqLhtijNhH-RPKiZ_wJb3-N3y_igewK7ynX-ohKI=)** ****_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_**** | | ****[CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58957535/392784933/272233028?refcode2=c8c1f5db-aeb0-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em230219-1-30-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGMxZjVkYi1hZWIwLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kxecqLhtijNhH-RPKiZ_wJb3-N3y_igewK7ynX-ohKI=)****

name: Sherrodbrown.com
subject: Just in from CNN
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
Sherrod Brown - Senator from Ohio [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87645/images/brown_2018_logo-outlined.png]
With just over a week to go to the next end-of-month deadline [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230219] , we want to bring you up to speed on the state of Sherrod’s race:
FIRST: A POLITICO article said, “Most voters tune into Senate races only days before a primary or general election, yet the next few months will be just as important to determining who wins the [Senate] next fall.”
THEN: Cleveland.com said our race “won’t be a walk” for Sherrod, and his first announced opponent is one of many expected challenges still to come.
NOW: CNN included Ohio near the top of its list of the 10 Senate seats most likely to flip next year. As the last statewide-elected Democrat in Ohio, Sherrod is facing an uphill battle to Election Day.
We can’t wait until Election Day -- or even the primary -- to get to work. We need to start now.
Here’s one way you can help right now: Chip in before the deadline because your contributions help us prepare for the attacks coming Sherrod’s way. Any amount you can spare -- like our average online contribution of $26 -- would go a long way. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230219]
Thank you,
Team Sherrod
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
Contributions or gifts to Friends of Sherrod Brown are not tax deductible.

3867 West Market Street
Ste. 289

clean_body: Sherrod Brown - Senator from Ohio [] With just over a week to go to the next end-of-month deadline [] , we want to bring you up to speed on the state of Sherrod’s race: FIRST: A POLITICO article said, “Most voters tune into Senate races only days before a primary or general election, yet the next few months will be just as important to determining who wins the [Senate] next fall.” THEN: Cleveland.com said our race “won’t be a walk” for Sherrod, and his first announced opponent is one of many expected challenges still to come. NOW: CNN included Ohio near the top of its list of the 10 Senate seats most likely to flip next year. As the last statewide-elected Democrat in Ohio, Sherrod is facing an uphill battle to Election Day. We can’t wait until Election Day -- or even the primary -- to get to work. We need to start now. Here’s one way you can help right now: Chip in before the deadline because your contributions help us prepare for the attacks coming Sherrod’s way. Any amount you can spare -- like our average online contribution of $26 -- would go a long way. [] Thank you, Team Sherrod PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN Contributions or gifts to Friends of Sherrod Brown are not tax deductible. Friends of Sherrod Brown 3867 West Market Street Ste. 289 Akron, OH 44333 United States Don't want to receive these emails anymore? unsubscribe: www.sherrodbrown.com []

The Democratic rule is officially over, and house Republicans have promised to hold the out-of-touch Democrats accountable by launching major investigations. YET, this won’t stop the Democratic-controlled Senate from taking advantage of their majority and passing restrictive gun bills that harm law-abiding gun owners like **YOU** – as they continue to do nothing to prevent the rising crime rates facing our major cities.

clean_body: We’ll be frank – we were disappointed to see you haven’t renewed your membership for 2023. | | | | | We can’t believe it: 9,408 Democrats have already renewed their 2023 DLCC Membership! That’s the energy state Democrats are counting on as they go toe-to-toe with Republicans in competitive races across the country. But we’ll be frank, we were disappointed to see you haven’t renewed your membership for 2023 yet. Does this look right? | 2023 DLCC MEMBERSHIP SUPPORTER RECORD SUPPORTER: 2023 Member Status: PENDING Suggested Gift: $10 Last year showed the nation just how critical Democratic leadership at the state level can be – abortion access, voting rights, gun safety, and so much more are being decided in state legislatures across the country. That’s why we’re reaching out to you today. Becoming an official member of this grassroots movement to elect state Democrats is the best step you can take to help build a better future in the states. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | 9,408 Democrats have already stepped up and fueled this fight as official members, will you join them today? **This week, we celebrated the namesake of our office building and the legacy of** _[**Barbara Johns**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=e22772b714c94f1a83c01769e05551a1&_e=o6YNFkiVV0dFnOgUPE5u7EzcLtBV8o3YCIBJzMo58QeXBH9X_Og_vPxsFLmTtu-q_l1Q7tIFu-Yd5zbi3te-p2FL0QSyAvDh08cL3oAMAjr5zKG71Z5grock4KiE3wxTWfL4eRYqG7F-DNIspGUOP6mxfQEpcZhXMN0aM1iN0rICrJw_68-_AnSnFvcKF0gY4ZrmCuBPDo26Dug-cZpkaxXA8hupFYzsuJ36j8xYUPLils3SWqKNwT8pwZxZa-el)_**, a brave 16 year old girl who exemplified the power of one. ** **Attorney General Miyares was honored to be joined by Barbara’s family at her permanent exhibit’s dedication in our building’s lobby.**

body:
If so, add your name to our petition >>
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58954800/392774616/-1745762055?refcode=em_eng_2023.02.19_b1_taaesfcdc_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTNlNDkzOC05MmIwLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VQNmGUvTm9dVb4vDeBPLHl4tuQTe_4dsblxl-QHBbak=)
Peter,

Right now, despite claiming to stand with and fight for American seniors, certain MAGA Republicans are proposing plans to _slash Social Security and gut Medicare_. _Yes, you read that right._

Government programs like these save lives. Republicans’ attempts to play political games with Social Security and Medicare are nothing short of dangerous and cruel.

[**We need to send a message, loud and clear, that Social Security and Medicare should be defended not destroyed. If you agree with Emilia that Congress should unequivocally defend these vital benefits, will you add your name to our petition?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58954801/392774617/-2002074890?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTNlNDkzOC05MmIwLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VQNmGUvTm9dVb4vDeBPLHl4tuQTe_4dsblxl-QHBbak=&emci=45fa321e-f8ae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=493e4938-92b0-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=11703046)

**Every senior in America deserves to live and retire with dignity. That means receiving the benefits they’ve paid into and earned.**

As long as Emilia is in Congress, she’ll fight to defend Social Security and Medicare, and ensure seniors across Northeast Ohio have access to the critical health and financial benefits they deserve.

[**Peter, we need to know if you’re with us in this fight. Will you stand with Emilia and urge Congress to defend senior benefits like Social Security and Medicare?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58954803/392774619/-2002074890?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTNlNDkzOC05MmIwLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VQNmGUvTm9dVb4vDeBPLHl4tuQTe_4dsblxl-QHBbak=&emci=45fa321e-f8ae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=493e4938-92b0-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=11703046)

Team Emilia

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brian=20Lenney?=
subject: how homeschool idaho has it wrong
body:
RE: ESA school choice bill |
---
| | We passed a school choice bill out of the Senate Edu committee last week...

And the "Homeschool Idaho" crowd is weirdly all up in arms about it (and by doing so, aligning themselves with leftist socialist groups like Reclaim Idaho, the Democrats, and other left-wing special interest groups).

**_But their angst is _misdirected_._**

And they're actually HURTING education freedom in Idaho by getting their base all fired up against our awesome bill (S 1038).

Because this bill is GOOD for homeschooling families.

And if it wasn't, I as a decade-long homeschooler would _NOT_ support it, let alone sponsor it!

**So if you're interested...**

[I made a long (ish) rambly video about it here](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=20f020e145&e=dea908e0fe "watch the video")

[](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=2f82da38f1&e=dea908e0fe)

Stay frosty,

Brian

\---

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Trump won Montana by 20 points, and the state GOP thinks this gives them a chance to beat out Sen. Jon Tester for his seat in 2024. Can you help him build up his campaign and get his message out to voters before conservatives flood the state with cash?
body:
GOP Senate pickup?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1652525a-7f20-4010-874a-92426f2af91c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, _If we lose Jon Tester’s seat in Montana, in 2024, we lose the Senate. 2024 isn’t as far off as it seems. The campaign season is already underway._ _[](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9118f28e-244a-4c47-bbca-d43282ec88f7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_ _Senator Jon Tester is running for reelection in Montana. _**_Tester has been everything you'd hope for as a Senator from a bright red state running as a Democrat._** He breaks with us on some issues where he has to represent his constituents. [**_Will you join us in showing Jon Tester how much we appreciate his political courage and in ensuring we hold onto the Senate majority, by giving Senator Tester $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc635d80f-43d9-44ef-b7cc-881bb329ce54/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_But whether it's key national issues like codifying choice or passing universal background checks on guns, or joining us on defining legislation such as the COVID stimulus & Inflation Reduction Acts, there is just never any question Jon Tester will be there, behind us 100%._**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5a5972d1-ecf6-46fa-8611-4f31486a960f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _No huffing and puffing his chest for the cameras. No negotiating on Meet The Press, or, worse, FoxNews. No attacking his own party or bragging about how much he disagrees with it. In other words, the anti-Joe Manchin._ **_Tester, like Manchin, comes from an overwhelming Trump state. Trump won Montana by 20% in 2016, yet Tester still stood up for his progressive values--FOR US--and was reelected in 2018 on his record and very Montana-esque being. He's perfect for the state, and perfect for the Democratic Party._** **_If we don't re-elect Tester, we will lose the Senate._** It's that simple. _And if we don't reward Tester for taking bold, progressive stands, even knowing he'll have to overcome the HUGE Trump lean of his state, then we can expect future Democrats from states like Montana to all be Joe Manchins._ A disaster. [**_So will you join us in showing Jon Tester how much we appreciate his political courage and in ensuring we hold onto the Senate majority, by giving Senator Tester $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T043124a0-a1a8-4af1-9059-7aa6b65517f9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for helping us reelect the good ones in hostile electoral territory._ Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tba810906-b682-43c6-ab05-9047e168ee6a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/jontester7-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2e03b5b0-77e8-4384-b4ca-8b7d7d7b6d94/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=d21615d4-8879-4b1d-a80f-bdcb71f2fe67&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=d21615d4-8879-4b1d-a80f-bdcb71f2fe67&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

name: The Ohio Democratic Party
subject: Our hearts are with the people of East Palestine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
How to help Ohioans impacted by the train derailment:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58954943/392775251/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzRkNGMyYy05NGIwLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=araWYXUu0pfNGWsUkWCWgfh4vxOzKKqH8gl5ThLQbIg=) | Team,

Earlier this month, a freight train carrying hazardous chemicals derailed near East Palestine, Ohio. In its aftermath, many residents were forced to flee their homes and have since expressed concerns about the environmental impacts, while some Ohioans have suffered physically as a result of the hazardous materials.

In times of crisis, Ohioans come together to help their neighbors in need. That's why we're encouraging Ohians to support the Brightside Project, a Columbiana County nonprofit, that is helping local families get the help and resources they need.

**To join their efforts,[Ohioans can chip in to the East Palestine Crisis Relief Fund](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58954944/392775252/1807525063?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzRkNGMyYy05NGIwLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=araWYXUu0pfNGWsUkWCWgfh4vxOzKKqH8gl5ThLQbIg=&emci=779951d7-6ab0-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=674d4c2c-94b0-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=25291327) or [find their Amazon Wish List for food and materials that local families need.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58954945/392775253/1567918281?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzRkNGMyYy05NGIwLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=araWYXUu0pfNGWsUkWCWgfh4vxOzKKqH8gl5ThLQbIg=&emci=779951d7-6ab0-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=674d4c2c-94b0-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=25291327)**

We stand with those asking for help and demanding answers. Senator Sherrod Brown is leading the charge, calling on federal agencies to supply the necessary resources to Columbiana County _without delay_.

Our hearts remain with those who have been affected by the train derailment. We'll continue to push for accountability and justice for Ohioans impacted by this crisis.

Thank you,

The Ohio Democratic Party

name: Team Jayapal
subject: Things that will help vs. things that won't help everyday Americans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We can't allow the far-right GOP House majority to cut Social Security and Medicare.
#
Peter,
It's been 48 days since the GOP assumed its narrow majority in the House. They could have spent their time focusing on the issues impacting everyday Americans and working to improve their lives.
Let's see what they've done instead:
Since last month, the GOP has used its narrow majority **to propose a 30% federal sales tax** that would disproportionately harm working class families and communities, renewed their **attacks on reproductive rights,** and have considered **holding the economy hostage** by refusing to raise the debt ceiling unless **Social Security and Medicare are slashed.**
Let us be clear: **_their cruelty is the point._**
Meanwhile, our movement has been organizing around large-scale policies that will actually improve life for working people across the country — like a **Green New Deal, Medicare for All,** and **raising the minimum wage,** among others.
I know this future is possible but our progressive coalition can't get there without your support — [**if you're able to, will you pitch in $3 or any amount today to help us fight for policies that will help everyday families?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/36705?refcode=em20230219-2191&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2191%2E420207%2EF1g9lW)
**[Pitch In $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/36705?refcode=em20230219-2191&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=2191%2E420207%2EF1g9lW)**
In these past two years, we used our House majority for good and today we can see the results:
* Cut prescription costs and capped the price of insulin
* Made the largest climate investment in history
* Passed comprehensive infrastructure legislation
* Protected marriage equality across the country
* Passed the first gun safety legislation in a generation

**While we may no longer have the House majority, our work is not over.** Organizing around the issues that impact our communities the most and championing the bold progressive answers to these solutions works — and is **_key_** to amplifying the collective voice of our grassroots movement.
Our determination to secure the progressive future we deserve isn't slowing down. With your support, we can and will do more. [**Will you chip in today to stand with our movement and continue our fight for a better tomorrow?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/36705?refcode=em20230219-2191&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2191%2E420207%2EF1g9lW)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/36705?refcode=em20230219-2191&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2191%2E420207%2EF1g9lW)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230219-2191-footer&t=23&refcode2=2191_420207_F1g9lW&akid=2191%2E420207%2EF1g9lW)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=2191%2E420207%2EF1g9lW)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2191%2E420207%2EF1g9lW)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: NBC: “Republicans target Sherrod Brown”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58955914/392779590/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODI5NDY2OS05Y2IwLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VEY2kJWZGHR0bABKlXHMG8e9OXaRHwX6MwrWuowThpg=&emci=5729a16e-d9ae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=b8294669-9cb0-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | I’m up for re-election in 2024 Peter, and as one of just three Senate Democrats in states Trump won and the only remaining statewide-elected Democrat in Ohio, I’m a prime target for Mitch McConnell and the GOP. _(There’s already a wealthy Republican state senator considering running against me.)_

NBC says my race could be “even nastier and more expensive” than last year’s Senate race in Ohio -- and that race was one of the most expensive in the country with over $200 million spent.

In fact, 2023 has only just begun and already an opponent has jumped into the race and the NRSC is running attack ads against me.

**[_Peter, this is going to be my toughest race yet, but if we work together, we can win in Ohio. Will you split a contribution between my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia as we begin the new year to protect our hard-won Senate majority?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58955915/392779591/-843865763?refcode=20230219.2_ShB_2AE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODI5NDY2OS05Y2IwLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VEY2kJWZGHR0bABKlXHMG8e9OXaRHwX6MwrWuowThpg=)**

I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio. I went to school with the sons and daughters of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. Eventually, those jobs disappeared as one big plant after another left town. Every day, I fight in the U.S. Senate to bring those jobs back to our state and to put money back in the pockets of hardworking families.

I wear a canary pin that a steelworker gave to me years ago – a reminder that workers used to have to take a canary with them to the coal mines in case there was dangerous gas. The pin is a symbol of the progress we’ve made on workers’ rights and the work we still have left to do.

Like raising wages. Making sure everyone has good job opportunities in their hometowns. Rewarding companies that invest in American jobs instead of shipping them overseas. Ensuring no one needs a second or third job just to get by.

That’s what the Dignity of Work is all about Peter. No matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do -- whether you punch a clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips -- your work has dignity and I’ll fight for you.

**[_I need you in this fight, too. It won’t be easy, but if we organize, work hard, and start early, I know we can do this. Please consider splitting our average online contribution of $26 -- or whatever amount makes the most sense for you._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58955916/392779592/-843865763?refcode=20230219.2_ShB_2AE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODI5NDY2OS05Y2IwLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VEY2kJWZGHR0bABKlXHMG8e9OXaRHwX6MwrWuowThpg=)**

With gratitude,

Sherrod

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: the calls you get when you have a school shooting
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
#
Friend -
On February 13, we had a school shooting at MSU, killing three students and leaving 5 more in critical condition. Unfortunately, this is the second school shooting in Elissa’s district in 14 months, since the Oxford High School shooing in November 2021. This means she’s part of a small and unfortunate club of Members of Congress who have experienced more than one mass shooting while in elected office.
When there is a school shooting, the phone won’t stop ringing. But the calls Elissa started getting after Oxford have now turned into a torrent: Republicans who are avid hunters and sportsmen, calling to say that something must change to protect our kids.
These callers know what we all know in our gut: There is no need to choose between having a gun for hunting or sport and caring about protecting our kids in places that should be their sanctuaries. You can do both. But some elected officials somehow think it’s heresy to even come to the table to discuss how to keep our kids safe from gun violence. Our community is hurting, and the bottom line is that everyone should be focused on the simple act of keeping our kids safe.
In the last Congress, after a horrible shooting at Oxford High School in which a student accessed a gun provided by his parents, Elissa introduced H.R. 6370, the _Safe Guns, Safe Kids Act._ The bill was targeted at preventing minors from accessing deadly weapons. All it said was that gun owners have to secure and store any firearms when children are present — and they’re held responsible if that child causes harm with their weapon, as a result of their failure to secure it. The same bill was introduced in the Michigan Senate.
In June 2022, the bill passed in the US House, but did not advance in the Senate. It couldn’t secure the 10 GOP votes needed to pass it into law.
But now, we are in a position to get real things done at the state level. In Michigan, we are putting our first Democratic majority in 40 years to good use. There is a whole package of bills being put together that address things like universal background checks, red flag laws, and the state-level version of Elissa’s safe storage bill. Hearings start Thursday on these bills.
For most people, it’s a no-brainer that we should be able to keep our kids safe. But this is just the beginning: Michiganders have to keep up the pressure on the people who want to maintain this deadly status quo.
It’s going to take all of us, working together, to help push for this progress we desperately need. We’ll update you on what comes next, and in the meantime, thank you for being an ally in this fight.
Thank you,
Team Slotkin

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=18%2E135344%2Exf3I09).

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Sign on to support Dreamers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
Getting this done needs to be top priority
#
Peter, when I first introduced the Dream Act in 2001, I had no idea I’d still be fighting to pass it more than two decades later.
But **I will stay in this fight as long as it takes** \-- because Dreamers are Americans in every sense of the word, except one, and it’s long past time for Congress to make that right.
The program that gives temporary deportation relief to hundreds of thousands of immigrants known as Dreamers is under threat in federal court.
With a Democratic Senate and President Biden’s support, we are closer than ever to a permanent pathway to citizenship for Dreamers. But **the GOP has blocked this crucial bill for over twenty years now -- and it’s going to take all of us speaking out to get it over the finish line.**
****[Peter, will you sign the petition right now to show your support for Dreamers?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58956022/392780175/297233956?refcode=dd_em_230219_t1_1&ms=dd_em_230219_t1_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmVhYzFhOS05ZWIwLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HdasSazEuQe_mwOWv5PWJDDj94QK9--YufxDn99r73I=&emci=eb499a38-42ad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=5beac1a9-9eb0-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=2727974)****
It's not just the right thing to do for Dreamers, it's also in the best interest of our communities and our economy. Passing the Dream Act will give Dreamers the stability and security they need to thrive, and it will strengthen our country as a whole.
**Getting this done needs to be top priority** \-- and I’ll be working as hard as I can to finally make it happen.
Can I count on your support as we work to pass these protections for Dreamers?
****[Your signature will send a message to Congress that it's time to finally pass the Dream Act and give Dreamers the permanent protections they deserve. Sign the petition to show your support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58956023/392780176/297233956?refcode=dd_em_230219_t1_1&ms=dd_em_230219_t1_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmVhYzFhOS05ZWIwLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HdasSazEuQe_mwOWv5PWJDDj94QK9--YufxDn99r73I=&emci=eb499a38-42ad-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=5beac1a9-9eb0-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=2727974)****
My best,
Dick Durbin

clean_body: Getting this done needs to be top priority Peter, when I first introduced the Dream Act in 2001, I had no idea I’d still be fighting to pass it more than two decades later. But I will stay in this fight as long as it takes \-- because Dreamers are Americans in every sense of the word, except one, and it’s long past time for Congress to make that right. The program that gives temporary deportation relief to hundreds of thousands of immigrants known as Dreamers is under threat in federal court. With a Democratic Senate and President Biden’s support, we are closer than ever to a permanent pathway to citizenship for Dreamers. But the GOP has blocked this crucial bill for over twenty years now -- and it’s going to take all of us speaking out to get it over the finish line. ** It's not just the right thing to do for Dreamers, it's also in the best interest of our communities and our economy. Passing the Dream Act will give Dreamers the stability and security they need to thrive, and it will strengthen our country as a whole. Getting this done needs to be top priority \-- and I’ll be working as hard as I can to finally make it happen. Can I count on your support as we work to pass these protections for Dreamers? My best, Dick Durbin ** **** ** Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

| | **BREAKING: Congressional Republicans Attack DC Sovereignty as Democrats Renew Push for Statehood**
---
The MAGA GOP knows that DC Statehood would almost certainly mean TWO more Democratic Senators, so they’re doing everything in their power to KILL the bill!

If we’re going to have any chance of fighting back, we need to demonstrate MASSIVE grassroots support for DC Statehood! **Please, respond now:**

[**Do you support DC Statehood?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/DCStatehoodPoll_v2/?source=VPP_20230219_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=6432%2E878179%2EGK1xgO)

Listen, not only would DC Statehood give hundreds of thousands of people much-needed representation in Congress, _it could SAVE our slim Senate majority!_

Republicans are TERRIFIED — so they’re launching vicious attacks to shut down any chance we have of making DC Statehood a reality.

clean_body: Let me explain | = Hey Peter, this is Rep. Mark Takano. I’m reaching out because I have a really important favor to ask you. = Let me explain: From the start, this movement was built by grassroots activists and everyday Americans who stepped up in small but important ways to help elect a gay, Japanese-American, teacher, and progressive (me!) to Congress. Since then, you all have helped me accomplish so much -- we’ve fought for LGBTQ+ rights, stood up to MAGA extremism, and championed veterans’ well-being. To this day, everything we’ve worked for has continued to rely on small-dollar donors like YOU, Peter -- not big Super PACs and billionaires like so many of my counterparts in the GOP. Peter -- let’s prove together that $1 can change the world. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thank you, Mark Takano | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517 www.marktakano.com Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, Republicans have captured a slim House Majority. The leadership of progressive Democrats like Mark will be critical to holding Republicans accountable and ensuring the healing of our country during this challenging time. If you are outside of Anchorage and want to watch the Kickoff, please click here or see our Facebook Page**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=63f2ecb8a0e77c64be0bed99&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fprofile.php%3Fid%3D100088118914747&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_63f2ea99bbd361604c43eacc&l=en-US&s=2vEnfUDJSEcp0aowgH6DviXKF5I%3D)

---
#### **More Signing Dates Below, Make Sure To Share with Friends & Family**
---
**admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com or call 907-802-8116****We only need 26,000 signatures, which is the lowest amount in history since we had the lowest turnout by percentage in history. Rank Choice Voting has made our job even easier. Let’s Do This Alaska.****If you would like to help us collect signatures, please sign up here** https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/petition-signatures**The Pro Rank Choice Voting group paid $300k and used mostly out of state signature gatherers, we want this done “By Alaskans, For Alaskans”**
---
#### **An Alaska Senator has said that our Bill is the Most Important Bill for the 2024 Election. We need you to get there. Help us Today!!!**
---
---
|
---
### **Come Sign Today**
#### **Want To Sign The First Petition To Get Rid Of Rank Choice Voting!!!**

There are 40 House Districts, we need at least 35 or 75% of the districts. Attached is a breakdown of how many signatures we need per district. We will need signature gatherers in each district. The sign up link is the only way we can keep track of all of the people who are getting petition books. The group that passed Ranked Choice Voting in 2020 spent over $300,000 just on the signature gathering process, they paid an out of state firm to gather signatures here in Alaska. We want to have Alaskans in charge this time around. They collected 40,000 signatures, we want to collect 75,000.
Link to sign up for a Petition Book
[https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/petition-signatures](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=63f2ecb8a0e77c64be0bed99&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%2Fpetition-signatures%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D63f2ea99bbd361604c43eacc%26ss_email_id%3D63f2ecb8a0e77c64be0bed99%26ss_campaign_name%3DMat-Su%2BFeb%2B21st%2BSign%2BThe%2BPetition%2B8am-8pm%2BPalmer%2BTrain%2BDepot%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-02-20T03%253A45%253A28Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_63f2ea99bbd361604c43eacc&l=en-US&s=l_AnABCzG2Xi4movT8BTzy70W8Q%3D)Please use the link below to find your house district or include your address if you do not know your house district. Scroll to the bottom and it has a search by address, which should tell you Your House and Senate Representatives.
[https://akleg.gov/Districts.php](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=63f2ecb8a0e77c64be0bed99&u=https%3A%2F%2Fakleg.gov%2FDistricts.php&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_63f2ea99bbd361604c43eacc&l=en-US&s=jJPK-Tm5LMVP0Of8ttL4bDzbj3g%3D)**To get involved please email**[**Admin@AlaskansForHonestElections.com**](mailto:admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com?subject=Newsletter%20Contact)

### Please Share with Friends, Family, and Co-Workers!
---
**We have completed two parts to the Petition Process, please read 3 and 4 below to learn about the next steps.****1.** Collect 100 Sponsor Signatures**(Completed November 23rd, 2022)****2.** After the Lt. Governor approves our initiative, we will need to collect 10% of the most recent General Election, which is the lowest turnout in 12 years, so our actual signatures needed will be less than 40,000. At this point (December-January 2022) we are collecting sponsor signatures to take a lead roll in removing Ranked Choice Voting from Alaska.**(Completed January 20th, 2023)****3\. We now need to collect signatures from at least 30,000 Registered Alaskan Voters, we will receive 500 Petition Books, each Book contains 150 Signatures. We need help, please see our timeline and either email, call, or text us if you would like to get involved.****4\. We will need signatures from 75% of the House Districts, We plan to collect signatures from 100% of the 40 House Districts. We will need to collect 10% of the total number of voters in the previous election in each House District. Please let us know if you have questions about this.**
---
[_ _ Call Us or Text Us Here _ _](tel:+19078028116)
---
---
|
---
**Rank choice was sold to Alaska by outsiders as a means to control dark money. Outsiders put more of their money than ever before in our elections. It did not work!****99% of their funding came from out of Alaska.****Rank Choice voting has proven to discourage voter turnout. This past election had the lowest turn out since 2010. It is so complicated that 1000’s did not vote.****Some voters, votes are counted 2 or 3 times. Not fair! It should be 1 person 1 vote.****This is not a partisan issue. Rank Choice voting affected everyone. In at least 1 race the Democrat received less that 15% of the vote.****Rank Choice creates division and bitterness.**
---
